description: PREPARATION OF START UP

subtasks.text: 1. Waste water, residue discharge SCHEDULE (Confirm Utility unit)
★ Secure START UP personnel arrangements.(man power)
3.Confirm instruments inspection, adjustment, CV function test finish. (If confirmation cannot be done without  fluid confirm during START UP activities)
Confirm check parameter and test function valve if EI calibrate and overhaul finish
★ Confirm completion of inter lock and sequence test
★Confirm completion of function test of ESD SW
4.Confirm eyewash fountain, shower function check already
5.Confirm inspect safety protection equipment, first aid medicine already

6.Confirm check preparation of operation materials and inventory oil grease, sample bottle, SUS-made bucket, tools, dry battery, handy ground cable for sampling, hose for hose station, handler of valve wheel, expedition light, printers paper, printer ribbon, Inspection sheet (List of SD, SU 'essential goods)
★ Test ESD SW and status valve
★ Inspect anti-static(Ground wire) electricity removal equipment
is blind plate status OK (insert, removal)
★ Pipe labeling-lettering, description on fluid name is good (Especially in case of modification, any change)
9.★Confirm inspection and installation of pressure gauge finish.
10.★Confirm inspection and installation of safety valve finish
12.Rotating equipment inspection confirm fill up oil , grease
13.Confirm test run after inspection and repair equipment complete
15.All SD construction works completed (Confined space work, Hot work)
16.Confirm remove blind plate at B/L completed
19.Confirm switch on electric power source for rotating equipment
22.Confirm receive Utility (*Marking utility items if put in service.)
Switch Security 3S to NORMAL (Steam 3S to PT-501)
23.Confirm utilities for bagging section in service (*Confirm Bagging section)
24.HOT OIL receiving to PTK-600 completed and send Hot oil from PTK-600 / PD-603 to PD-601 (*In case of HO regeneration)
25.PD-201 Pd/C catalyst washing by water completed
26.★Test adjust SV FC-2101A 10 --> 15 --> 20 t/h (Monitor at rack room)

description: Preparation and receive utilities

subtasks.text: IA, SA, 9N, 7N, H₂, FG, DIW, CCW & RCCW

description: Line up plant for start up

subtasks.text: Line up hot oil and main process
Line up DIW to PD-502 , LPW , MPW system route PM-500-->PE-501-->PE-404 -->PE-502-->PD-502
Preparation waste water system TP-800 and TP-802 (TU-800 , TU-802 )

description: Line up main process

subtasks.text: Route HZV-2106 -->PP-102A or B or C -->PE-101A- F -->PD-201 -->PD-301-4
PC-2301A/B open 100%  and  Block valve A/B open 100%
PC-2302A/B open 100%  and  Block valve A/B open 100%
PC-2303A/B open 100%  and  Block valve A/B open 100%
PC-2304A/B open 100%  and  Block valve A/B open 100%

description: Hot oil cold circulation operation (Confirm level PD-601 ≥ 15%)
Receive DIW , LPW , MPW system

subtasks.text: DIW to DIW system (for check leak system)
DIW to LPW system (for check leak system)
DIW to MPW system (for check leak system)
Receive DIW to PD-502 level to normal (LC-2502 = 80%)
Gradually receive DIW Confirm UT and monitor pressure DIW PI-3300

description: Start PP-502A(B) circulation control Pressure PC-2502 = 12.5 kg/cm²

subtasks.text: Open B/V bypass PCV-2502 = 100% before start pump prevent pressure high

description: Start PP-503A(B)

subtasks.text: Before start PP-503 B/M open PCV-2503   ̴ 30 % and PC-2505 = 100% (Prevent safety valve blow)
PC-2702B  Set ML = 5%  ( AUT) prevent pressure high
B/M Open MPW to FC-2701 = 900 kg/hr., FC-2702 = 800 kg/hr., FC-2703 = 800 kg/hr., PC-2701 = 25 Kg/cm2
PC-2702 A/B = 25 kg/cm²  ( PC-2702 MV = 0 % >> operate line by pass   ̴ 0.5 round, B =AUT )

description: Start PP-504A(B)

subtasks.text: Before introduce seal agitator set I/L pressure = 0 kg/cm² prevent pressure seal swing
F/O receive DIW to seal agitator and service PZ-301 - 304 , 401
B/M introduce mechanical seal water to PJ-301-->304 , 401
* PJ-301 - 304 and 401 set pressure seal diff from drum 5 kg/cm²

description: Start main process cold circulation and pressurize

subtasks.text: Start LPW cold circulation operation (Confirm start PP-502 complete )
Introduce LPW to HZV-2106 -->PP-102A(B)(C) --> PE-101A- F blow and check clean one by one -->PD-201 -->PD-301- 4 blow and check clean one by one
Continue washing crystallizer PD-301-304 check clean one by one
After each drum clean close bottom for up level =20% one by one
If PD-301-304 have level =20% start PJ-301-304 one by one (Check rotating & condition)
After level PD-201 > 100% Continue work to start pressurize feed and reactor (Start PP-102) (Disconnect vent(1

description: Preparation drain condensate PE-502, PE-503, PE-504 (warm up)and start lube oil PM-401A/B

subtasks.text: Preparation drain condensate PE-502, PE-503, PE-504
Start PX-411 A/B Check back up oil unit service to normal

description: Start hot oil cold circulation operation (For PP-601A(B)(C) AUT start by B/M)

subtasks.text: Confirm F/O close block valve main user and close HZV-2604
Confirm no waler contamination with hot oil in PD-601
Cir hot oil FC-2601 only and control flow ~ 170 t/h (Depen on condition pump PP-601 and level PD-601 not low and not loss suction)

description: Pressurize the feed and reactor (Target pressure : 65 kg/cm2)

subtasks.text: Start PC-201A(B) (start PC-201 before Start PP-102 ~30 min.) B/M manual open FC-2202 flow =50 Nm³/hr. after that change to AUT and set SV=50 Nm³
Before start PP-102 make sure PCV-2201 open MV ~ 15 %
After start PP-102 quickly control pressure reactor PC-2201 ~ 65 kg/cm²
If start PP-102 complete continue heat up main process

description: Start PP-304A(B)

subtasks.text: If PD-304 level ~ 20 % Start PP-304A(B) Route line PP-304 --> PD-404 --> Start PJ-404 --> PP-404A(B) --> PW-901 --> TU-800

description: F/O check H.O inlet PF-601 (Balance 4 line ) (After start PP-601 ~30 min.)

subtasks.text: Vent air from each other user SV-2602 SV-2606 (SV-2103 after service PE-101E-F)
After start PP-601 continue work to start heat hot oil
Open block valve FG tie in and battery limit (Confirm all block valve pilot and main burner close)
Ignition of the pilot line (4 line)
Check temp TI-2620 A - D of hot oil outlet PF-601 temp increase nearly every line

description: Heating up H.O. by ignite main burner one by one (50°C/hr)
Heat up main process and pressurize crystallizer

subtasks.text: Close PC-2301 , 2302 , 2303 , 2304 MV = 0 % and change mode AUT
PC-2301 SV = 39 K/G(Normal = 42 K/G) , PC-2302 SV = 17 K/G , PC-2303 SV = 8 K/G , PC-2304 SV = 3.9 K/G
LCV-2102 , 2103 , 2104 , 2105 manual MV = 0 % (Open block valve all ~ 30% for drain condensate)
Heat up PE-502 to ~ 101°C (target 50oC/hr ) (Concerning use steam effect to 15S of CTA unit)
- ***Start heat up main process please prepare line up for start loop separation1 , 2  system
Prepare centrifuge and RPF(Warm up) and pressurize for LPW washing --> PD-401 --> PD-402-->RVF--> PD-405 --> PD-501 --> Blow)
Open PCV-2115(10S) for heat PE-101A (Pressure 2.2 kg/cm² , temp ~120°C)
Heat up PE-401 follow temp user process (TI-2304)
Open PCV-2116(10S) for heat PE-101B (pressure 6.5 kg/cm² , temp ~160°C)
Heat up PE-503 follow temp user process (TI-2303)
Open PCV-2117(25S) for heat PE-101C (pressure 16.5  kg/cm² , temp ~190°C)
Heat up PE-504 follow temp user process (TI-2302)
Heat up PLH-401 follow temp user process (TI-2304)
Heat up PD-1206 follow temp user process (TI-2302)

description: PE-601 and PD-1205

subtasks.text: When temp (TI-2620) to 150°C warm up and pressurize PE-601 , PD-1205
PLH-301 heat up follow temp user (Less than user 5°C)

description: Start separation and dryer system

subtasks.text: Line up loop PM-401A/B/D --> PD-401-->PD-402-->RVF--> PD-405-->PD-501 blow  to ww(P)

description: Line up and start RPF and warm up PM-401D (2 hr)

subtasks.text: Before pressurize loop centrifuge top up LPW to PD-401 = 20% , PD-403 = 20%
Line up and start RPF and warm up PM-401D (2 hr)
When temp LPW nearly = 100°C pressurize loop centrifuge and RPF
Service steam tracing line ML PM-401
Set pressure PC-2401 diff more than PC-2304 = 1.5 kg/cm² (Normal PC-2304 = 3.9 kg/cm² and PC-2401 = 4.1 kg/cm²)
Switch discharge PP-304 to PM-401D if TI-2304 ~ 100°C
Service 5S blow back RPF (Wait 5S from CTA)
Hot water operation loop separation by HZ-2106 -->PP-102-->PE-101A-F -->PD-201-->PD-301-4-->PP-304 -->PM-401D -->PD-403 -->PD-404 -->PW-901-->PP-901 and and blow to TU-800

description: Line up loop RVF
Prepare start PP-601 two operation

subtasks.text: TC-2601 200 --> 250°C ,  Prepare start PP-601 two operation FC-2601 ~170 --> 450 t/h
Control to CAS of TC-2601 and FC-2611
Control to MAN of AC-2601 and FC-2610 AUT
Control to CAS of TC-2101 and FC-2604
Control to CAS of FC-2601 and FC-2603

description: Introduce steam to tracing line jacket pipe and valve

subtasks.text: Introduce steam to tracing line jacket pipe and valve If TI-2108 ~ 200°C
When PC-2304 MV open F/O open vent PE-101A to sewer (Reduce air block)
When PC-2303 MV open F/O open vent PE-101B to sewer (Reduce air block)
When PC-2302 MV open F/O open vent PE-101C to sewer (Reduce air block)
When PC-2301 MV open F/O open vent PE-101D to sewer (Reduce air block)
- If operate PE-302 complete can open PE-101D  vent to PE-302 at local
Start heat generate steam PE-302 , PD-1202 system when TI-2302 ~ 180°C

description: Heat up main process by Hot oil

subtasks.text: Confirm temp H.O more than temp main process ~ 50°C TC-2601 = 250°C
After temp main process ~ 200°C then introduce H.O to PE-101E and F and continue heat temp main process to 282 oC (TC-2101)
When temp main process = 200°C service H.O user

description: Start RPF

subtasks.text: Introduce LPW to PM-401D (FC-2414D ~ 10 t/hr & PC-2406D ~ 9  kg/cm² )
Route: LPW (FC-2414D) --> PD-401 --> PD-402 -->PP-402 --> PM-402 A/B --> PD-405 -->PD-501  Blow and check water claen

description: Start PP-402(A)B send to RVF

subtasks.text: Introduce DIW to PT-401 for washing
Open FCV-2408 = 5 t/h to PT-401 control LC-2410 SV= 40%
Start heating up PE-403 to 101°C (For heat TC-2403 50°C /hr)

description: Start Lube oil dryer

subtasks.text: Before start dryer 1 hr and check oil drop all point

description: Start loop dryer

subtasks.text: Receive N₂  FC-2411 control flow = 800 Nm³/hr (Normal FC-2411 SV = 1500 Nm³/hr)
Start PC-401 (Follow up new procedure: PC-2412 MV = 10% , XC-2410 MV = 100% and open suction PC-401 = 100%)
Introduce N₂  to labyrinth seal = 300 Nm³/hr
Line up PZ-403 to PTK-800C(Or off spec silo Or TTK-401 if pressure not high)
Open drain bottom PZ-403 for drain water
Heat up PZ-403 ( Normal TC-2415 SV ~125°C )
Check drain at PZ-403 condition clean and not water after that close valve drain
Heat up of PM-404-1 , -2 ( Normal TC-2410 SV = 117°C )
Warm up by 5S and control pressure PC-2404 = 2 kg/cm²
Open vent condensate of dryer until change to steam then close valve

description: Up level PD-501

subtasks.text: Prepare condition PD-501 for recycle solvent operation (Control LC-2501B.SV = 80%)
Start PP-501A(B) circulation and send to PD-101

description: Switch LPW to recycle solvent via PD-101

subtasks.text: Line up recycle solvent water to PD-101 level ~ 70%

description: Switch LPW to recycle solvent operation by route re-slurry operation

subtasks.text: LPW purge LC-2402C confirm not plug
Switch LPW to recycle solvent operation by route re-slurry operation
- Open SDV-2105 --> Close HZ-2106 and close SDV-2104
Start parallel operation of PP-102A(B)(C) and adjust condition plant (temp. H.O , Main process) prepare TA feed
Confirm blind line H₂ to service side(B/L) and F/O switch from N₂ to H₂
Change feed to PD-201 from N₂ --> H₂
- Before start CTA feed ~ 2 hr please switch to H₂
*Change control FC-2202 AUT to CAS and LC-2201 AUTO SV=50%*
After that B/M adjust condition plant  for prepare start TA feed

description: PG of RD confirmation check  before start TA feed

subtasks.text: 7.PG-2611 of RD-2601 (SV-2602 Vent hot oil PF-601 to PD-601)

description: Preparation for start TA feed by route re-slurry operation

subtasks.text: 1. Mode of weighting auto feeder = Volume mode
6. FC-2105 ~ 15 t/hr (Inc flow follow up TA feed)
14. Is FEED, REACTOR, CRYSTALLIZER system operation stable
16. Confirm HZ-2402A/B OPEN? (PM-402-A/B slide gate damper)
17. Confirm KCV-2101 OPEN? (Valve between PM-101-1 to PM-101-2)
18. Other process section system operation stable
20. Is PM-404 OUT pneumatic line (PTA dryer out diverter valve) selected for PTK-800C (Or A or B for off spec silo).
21. Confirm inter lock status before START by interlock CHECK LIST
22. Are REACTOR START conditions (just before CTA feed) already
- (Refer to DIS for detail process conditions): Confirm by Eng.PE
23. Confirm inform “START up time” to concerned parties
24. Did you hold meeting to confirm/make sure that SU policy, manpower staffing, instruction & communication route?
25.Start receive CTA powder TTK-400 to PTK-101

description: Preparation for start TA feed by route re-slurry operation
Start TA feed

subtasks.text: Start TA feed to PD-101 by exapilot program (PM-101-1 auto start follow PM-101-2)
Monitor density AI-2100 , AI-2101 gradually increase
Monitor density AI-2100 , AI-2101 gradually increase
Monitor torque and density of RPF (PM-401D)(XIS-2401D,AI-2420D)

description: - Start SEQ LC-2301-2303 OPEN/CLOSE
After TA feed finish can stop PM-102
Start operate PM-901

subtasks.text: Check line drain PP-901 have slurry

description: Prepare switch from recycle slurry to normal

subtasks.text: Start dryer system and pressurize PC-2404A ~ 3 kg/cm²
Before slurry feed to RVF start loop RVF and confirm HZ-2402A/B open
Line up dryer to PTK-800C (Or A or B for off spec silo)
Confirm PM-102 and PM-404-2 running and PM-101-1, -2 ready to start
Receive CTA powder to PTK-101 ~ 4 ton
Before intake PTA powder to PTK-800C(A/B) confirm line up silo complete and confirm open butterfly valve vent silo line modify to ATM  prevent pressure silo high (Normal 10-200 mmH₂O

description: Switch from recycle slurry to normal

subtasks.text: Start feed RVF operation and open DIW FC-2412
Star PP-405A(B) before start pump pls blow down lump PD-405 to sewer
Due to "reduce S/U product project" >>> Depen on Eng. PE1
Intake PTA powder to PTK-800C for reprocess
- # 1st hour after first powder drop from PTA dryer  switch silo to PTK-800A
- Transfer powder PTK-800C to TTK-401 after switch PTK-800C to A
- # 2nd hour after first powder drop from PTA dryer switch silo to PTK-800B
- ** If PTA powder on spec, then switch silo to on spec silo

description: Start Exapilot program
I/L confirmation check
Confirmation check level drum " LOCAL & DCS "
